---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something for the commit/diff/browse workflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The itch
<!-- What's the workflow pain? Kyde is deliberately just the commit/diff/browse screen —
features that pull it toward being a full IDE are likely out of scope. -->

## What you'd like
<!-- Describe the feature. A rough sketch / screenshot of the layout helps. -->

## Speed cost
<!-- Be honest: would this add per-keystroke / per-frame work, or a heavy dependency?
If it needs a big grammar/library, could it live behind a Cargo feature so it's opt-in? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Anything you tried or thought about. -->
